name: Western Union
description_short: Los Angeles, CA's Western Union at 2801 N Main St offers money transfer and check-cashing services daily 7AM-9PM.
description_long:
Western Union's Los Angeles location at 2801 N Main St is a standalone check-cashing store serving the community with convenient access. This Los Angeles branch is open daily from 7AM to 9PM, providing extended hours for residents and visitors to manage their financial needs.

At this 2801 N Main St location in Los Angeles, CA, services include international money transfers, check cashing, and bill payment options. Contact this Western Union office at +1 323-576-2270 to verify services or ask questions before visiting.

Residents of Los Angeles can visit this Western Union location during extended daily hours (7AM-9PM) to send money domestically or internationally, or to cash checks. Bring a valid government-issued ID and your payment method for quick service.
address: 2801 N Main St, Los Angeles, CA 90031

company_info.headquarters: 2801 N Main St, Los Angeles, CA 90031

pros: Global coverage: Supports money transfers to over 200 countries and territories
Multi-currency support: Handles transfers in numerous currencies with real-time exchange rate display
First-transfer promotion: $0 fee on first online international transfer for new registered users
Transparent pricing: Shows fee ranges and exchange rates upfront before completing transactions
Online registration: Allows account creation for better exchange rates on future transfers
Easy access: Simple web-based interface for initiating transfers from the United States
cons: Variable fees: Fee structure shows ranges rather than fixed rates, making budget planning uncertain
Exchange rate spread: Real-time rates shown suggest potential markup between displayed rates and actual rates applied
Limited transparency on service options: Website content does not detail physical agent locations, cash pickup options, or alternative delivery methods
Dynamic pricing: Fees and rates change regularly, requiring rate checking before each transfer
Technical issues noted: Website mentions 'Orange wallet temporarily unavailable' indicating service disruptions
best_for: International remittance senders in the United States supporting family or businesses abroad
New customers taking advantage of $0 first-transfer fee promotions
Users needing transfers to less common destinations with limited alternative options
People seeking online-only transfers without visiting physical locations
diagnosis: Western Union is best for international money transfer needs to over 200 countries with transparent exchange rates and promotional first-transfer incentives. The primary caveat is that website content is limited to online services; customers requiring physical agent locations, cash pickup options, or other traditional money transfer services should verify these offerings separately, as they are not detailed in the provided website information.
services: Online international money transfers from the United States
Exchange rate comparison and transparency tools
Promotional fee offers for new customers
Send amount calculation with receiver payout display
meta_description: Los Angeles, CA: Western Union at 2801 N Main St – money transfers, check cashing, open daily 7AM-9PM.
